title: dennstaedtia rectangularis
intro: Dennstaedtia rectangularis, also known as the rectangular fan fern or rectangular moon daisy, is a species of fern in the family Dennstaedtiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia rectangularis include its ability to treat skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
